genre_refs: Art Deco / WPA poster style; Lincoln Memorial
description: Art Deco recruitment poster rendered as a flat vector illustration in a sepia, gold, cream and dark-navy palette. The central figure is the seated Abraham Lincoln statue from the Lincoln Memorial, with Lincoln in his chair flanked by the two fasces-topped columns of the memorial's armrests. Behind him radiate geometric sunburst rays and stepped Art Deco and skyscraper motifs, with a circular glow behind his head. Across the bottom in cream all-caps sans-serif is the text 'YOUR NATION CALLS', and beneath it in smaller spaced caps the URL 'APPRENTICESHIP.GOV'. The tweet text includes 'ANSWER THE CALL' and references the DOL 'Make America Skilled Again' apprenticeship campaign.
